---
title: "Kline DuBose"
listing:
  contents:
    - "main_presentation.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title]
about:
  template: trestles
  image: dubose_headshot.jpg
  links:
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: X
      href: https://x.com/KlineDuBose
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/KPDuBose
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kline-dubose/
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-Mail
      href: mailto:kline.dubose@utah.edu
    - icon: file-earmark-arrow-down
      text: CV
      href: cv.qmd
---

I am a PhD candidate in Biostatistics at the University of Utah, where I work as a Graduate Research Assistant. My research focuses on clinical trial methodology, with particular interests in adaptive trial design, covariate-adjusted response-adaptive randomization, and exact testing methods. Broadly, I am interested in developing statistical methods that make clinical trials more efficient, informative, and responsive to patient-level characteristics.

My work includes both methodological and applied research. In methodological settings, I use simulation studies and statistical modeling to evaluate adaptive designs under a range of trial conditions. In applied collaborations, I contribute to study design, data analysis, and reporting across health-related research projects.

## Education

**University of Utah** | Salt Lake City, UT                                         
PhD in Biostatistics | Aug 2022 - Present


**Utah State University** | Logan, UT                                             
B.S. in Statistics | Jan 2019 - May 2022

## Experience

**University of Utah** | Graduate Research Assistant | Aug 2022 - Present

**University of Utah**, DELPHI | T.A. for R Coding Bootcamp | June 2023 - Present

**Utah State University** | Recitation Leader, Teaching Assistant | Aug 2020 - May 2022

## Welcome

Welcome to my website. Here you can find information about my background, current work, and selected projects.

Please feel free to [contact me](mailto:kline.dubose@utah.edu) with questions or collaboration inquiries.

The following is currently available:
